artifact.source:
root = Card([diffView], "server.ts changes", "Diff between HEAD~1 and HEAD", "lg", true)
diffData = Query("git_diff", {file: "repo/src/server.ts", base: "HEAD~1"}, {file: "repo/src/server.ts", before: "", after: ""})
diffView = DiffViewer(diffData.file, diffData.before, diffData.after, "typescript", "none")
